title: MySQL CDC Streaming
description: Actor interactions for streaming MySQL binlog change events to Kafka

actors.name: DBA/Operator
actors.description: Configures and deploys the MySQL connector

actors.name: Kafka Connect Framework
actors.description: Deploys connector, manages task lifecycle, collects SourceRecords

actors.name: MySQL Database
actors.description: External source producing binlog events via BinaryLogClient

use_cases.name: Configure MySQL Connector
use_cases.description: Provide connector config (MySqlConnectorConfig.ALL_FIELDS), validate all fields via validateAllFields()

use_cases.name: Deploy Connector Task
use_cases.description: Framework calls taskClass()=MySqlConnectorTask.class, then starts task lifecycle

use_cases.name: Initialize Task & Validate Binlog
use_cases.description: preStart() creates MySqlTaskContext; start() builds connection, schema, validates binlog format (ROW) and row_image (FULL), validates snapshot feasibility

use_cases.name: Stream Binlog Change Events
use_cases.description: BinaryLogClient connects to MySQL, receives binlog events. execute() registers event handlers per EventType, then client starts streaming.

use_cases.name: Handle INSERT / WRITE_ROWS Event
use_cases.description: EventType.WRITE_ROWS / EXT_WRITE_ROWS dispatched to handleInsert(). Skipped if CREATE operation is in skippedOperations.

use_cases.name: Handle UPDATE / UPDATE_ROWS Event
use_cases.description: EventType.UPDATE_ROWS / EXT_UPDATE_ROWS dispatched to handleUpdate(). Skipped if UPDATE operation is in skippedOperations.

use_cases.name: Handle DELETE / DELETE_ROWS Event
use_cases.description: EventType.DELETE_ROWS / EXT_DELETE_ROWS dispatched to handleDelete(). Skipped if DELETE operation is in skippedOperations.

use_cases.name: Handle DDL / Schema Change Event
use_cases.description: EventType.QUERY dispatched to handleQueryEvent(). Distinguishes BEGIN/COMMIT from DDL. Handles TRUNCATE via TRUNCATE_STATEMENT_PATTERN.

use_cases.name: Handle GTID Event
use_cases.description: When GTID mode enabled, handleGtidEvent() filters by gtidDmlSourceFilter. Abstract method overridden by MySQL-specific subclass.

use_cases.name: Handle Transaction Payload (Compressed)
use_cases.description: EventType.TRANSACTION_PAYLOAD dispatched to handleTransactionPayload() for compressed binlog event handling.

use_cases.name: Rotate Binlog File
use_cases.description: EventType.ROTATE dispatched to handleRotateLogsEvent(). Updates BinlogSourceInfo with new binlog filename/position.

use_cases.name: Track Binlog Position / Source Metadata
use_cases.description: Tracks server_id, ts_sec, gtid, binlog file+position, row, snapshot state, thread, db, table. Serialized into offset map for Kafka Connect.

use_cases.name: Dispatch Change Event to Kafka
use_cases.description: BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource calls eventDispatcher to enqueue DataChangeEvent into ChangeEventQueue. Kafka Connect polls and sends to Kafka.

use_cases.name: Handle Streaming Error
use_cases.description: MySqlErrorHandler extends ErrorHandler. Classifies IOException/SQLException as communication exceptions. MySQL error 1236 (ER_MASTER_FATAL_ERROR_READING_BINLOG) is NON_RETRIABLE. Other SQLExceptions delegated to super.isRetriable().

use_cases.name: Handle Heartbeat Error
use_cases.description: Inner class BinlogHeartbeatErrorHandler implements HeartbeatErrorHandler. SQL states 42000 (DB access denied) and 3D000 (no DB) throw DebeziumException; others are silently ignored.

use_cases.name: Monitor Streaming Metrics
use_cases.description: Tracks GTID mode status, total record counter, streaming lag. Updated via metrics.setIsGtidModeEnabled().

use_cases.name: Handle BinaryLogClient Lifecycle Events
use_cases.description: onConnect, onDisconnect, onCommunicationFailure, onEventDeserializationFailure callbacks wired to BinaryLogClient.

key_relationships: BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource uses EventDispatcher → ChangeEventQueue → Kafka Connect
BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource uses BinlogSourceInfo for offset/position tracking
MySqlErrorHandler uses ChangeEventQueue (to propagate fatal errors)
include_extend_notes: UC5/UC6/UC7 <<extend>> UC4 (streaming): DML event types are sub-cases of the main streaming use case
UC8 <<extend>> UC4: DDL/schema changes are a sub-case of streaming
UC9 <<extend>> UC4: GTID handling extends streaming when GTID mode is enabled
UC14 <<extend>> UC4: error handling is an extension of the streaming flow
UC12 <<include>> UC11: position tracking is included in binlog rotation
UC16 <<include>> UC4: metrics monitoring is included in streaming
important_notes: MySQL error 1236 (fatal binlog read error) is the only explicitly non-retriable error. Binlog must be configured with binlog_format=ROW and binlog_row_image=FULL. GTID support is optional but changes event routing. BinaryLogClient from mysql-binlog-connector library is the core transport. Buffer mode (EventBuffer) is available when bufferSizeForStreamingChangeEventSource > 0.
